title: brachychiton × hirtellus
intro: Brachychiton × hirtellus, also known as the bastard kurrajong or bastard kurrajong tree, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Brachychiton. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Brachychiton × hirtellus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
